files.patch:
@@ -34,11 +34,9 @@
-
-$(eval $(call SetupBuildLauncher, jconsole, \
-    MAIN_CLASS := sun.tools.jconsole.JConsole, \
-    JAVA_ARGS := \
-        --add-opens java.base/java.io=jdk.jconsole \
-        --add-modules ALL-DEFAULT \
-        -Djconsole.showOutputViewer \
-        -Djdk.attach.allowAttachSelf=true, \
-    WINDOWS_JAVAW := true, \
-))
-
+  $(eval $(call SetupBuildLauncher, jconsole, \
+      MAIN_CLASS := sun.tools.jconsole.JConsole, \
+      JAVA_ARGS := \
+          --add-opens java.base/java.io=jdk.jconsole \
+          --add-modules ALL-DEFAULT \
+          -Djconsole.showOutputViewer \
+          -Djdk.attach.allowAttachSelf=true, \
+      WINDOWS_JAVAW := true, \
+  ))
